creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

An updated driver is required to fully support all Haswell GPUs. The work is almost ready. You can follow progress on the wiki:
https://wiki.freebsd.org/action/fullsearch/Graphics/Update%20i915%20GPU%20driver%20to%20Linux%203.8?action=fullsearch&context=180&value=linkto%3A%22Graphics%2FUpdate+i915+GPU+driver+to+Linux+3.8%22
